meaning: come quick,danger 遇险,请速来救(旧时使用的求救信号)
examples: By capturing such a broad range of light waves — wider than normal solar cells — tandem CQD solar cells can in principle reach up to 42 per cent efficiencies.
The team pioneered solar cells made using CQD, nanoscale materials that can readily be tuned to respond to specific wavelengths of the visible and invisible spectrum.
When the Titanic was sinking in 1912, its operator first sent out CQD and then SOS, alternating.
